_comment: 企業綠電/CPPA 卡片：人工整理自公開永續報告與新聞，每筆附來源與年份。各公司年份與口徑可能不同。

disclaimer.zh: 以下資料整理自各公司公開永續報告、RE100 與媒體報導；年份與統計口徑可能不同，僅供大眾理解參考。
disclaimer.en: Compiled from public sustainability reports, RE100 and media coverage; years and methodologies vary between companies. For general reference only.

cppa.zh: 累計簽訂 4.4GW 再生能源購電契約（CPPA），為台灣最大企業綠電買家
cppa.en: 4.4 GW of cumulative renewable PPAs — Taiwan's largest corporate clean-power buyer

cppa.zh: 在台簽訂 181MWp 再生能源購電契約，2024 年起供電
cppa.en: 181 MWp of renewable PPAs in Taiwan, supplying since 2024

cppa.zh: 自 2017 年起以綠電採購 100% 匹配年度用電；2024 年以「全天候無碳電力（24/7 CFE）」衡量則為 66%
cppa.en: Matches 100% of annual usage with renewables since 2017; measured as 24/7 carbon-free energy, 66% in 2024

target.zh: 2030 年達成 24/7 全天候無碳電力

cppa.zh: 自 2021 年起以綠電採購 100% 匹配用電；AI 需求使近年用電量連年成長逾 25%
cppa.en: Has matched 100% of usage with renewable purchases since 2021; AI demand is growing its usage >25% per year

cppa.zh: 以大量 CPPA 支持 100% 綠電匹配（主要用於資料中心）
cppa.en: Maintains 100% renewable matching through large CPPAs (mostly for data centers)

target.zh: 維持 100% 再生能源匹配

cppa.zh: 全球最大企業綠電採購者（BNEF 排名連年第一）：2023 年單年簽約 8.8GW、橫跨 16 國，累計綠電組合達 33.6GW、逾 500 個專案
cppa.en: World's largest corporate clean-power buyer (BNEF #1 for years running): 8.8 GW signed across 16 countries in 2023 alone, a 33.6 GW cumulative portfolio across 500+ projects

cppa.zh: 自營據點（43 國的資料中心、門市、辦公室）100% 使用再生能源，並推動供應鏈轉綠電
cppa.en: Own operations (data centers, stores, offices in 43 countries) run on 100% renewables; pushing its supply chain to follow

target.zh: 2030 年全供應鏈與產品生命週期碳中和
target.en: Carbon-neutral supply chain and products by 2030

cppa.zh: 2024 年再生能源使用 10,069 GWh；消費電子（DX）部門已達 93.4%，但耗電最大的半導體（DS）部門僅 24.8%——受限於韓國綠電市場
cppa.en: Used 10,069 GWh of renewables in 2024; its consumer (DX) division is at 93.4%, but the power-hungry semiconductor (DS) division only 24.8%, constrained by Korea's green-power market

target.zh: RE100：2050 年全球營運 100% 再生能源
target.en: RE100: 100% renewables across global operations by 2050

cppa.zh: RE100 高績效成員；再生電力主要透過再生能源憑證（EAC）採購（約 97%）
cppa.en: High-performing RE100 member; ~97% of its renewable electricity is procured via energy attribute certificates (EACs)

target.zh: 2030 年全球營運 100% 再生電力
target.en: 100% renewable electricity across global operations by 2030

cppa.zh: 自建 340MW 太陽光電（50+ 處）並持續擴大綠電採購（2023 年估逾 6,000 萬度）
cppa.en: 340 MW of own solar across 50+ sites, with growing procurement (est. 60+ GWh in 2023)

target.zh: RE100：2040 年 100% 再生能源（台灣電信業首家）

cppa.zh: 約 55% 用電由廠內汽電共生自發；設置 83.2MW 太陽光電，發電量居台灣製造業第一
cppa.en: ~55% of usage self-supplied by on-site cogeneration; its 83.2 MW of solar leads Taiwan's manufacturing sector

target.zh: 2050 碳中和路徑（高爐減碳＋氫能冶金研發）
target.en: 2050 carbon-neutral roadmap (blast-furnace abatement + hydrogen metallurgy R&D)

cppa.zh: 上表為向台電購電量（集團另有六輕等大型自備電廠，自發電未計入）；環團調查其設置的再生能源多以賣電為主、幾乎不自用
cppa.en: Figure above is grid purchases only (the group also self-generates heavily at Mailiao); NGOs found its renewable installations mostly sell power rather than supply its own use

cppa.zh: 2024 年動工年產 250 萬噸的電弧爐（比高爐減碳最多 75%），走「以電代煤」路線
cppa.en: Broke ground in 2024 on a 2.5 Mt/yr electric-arc furnace (up to 75% less CO2 than blast furnaces) — electrifying steelmaking

target.zh: 2030 年量產綠色鋼材、2050 碳中和（HyREX 氫還原煉鐵）
target.en: Green steel at scale by 2030, carbon-neutral by 2050 (HyREX hydrogen reduction)

cppa.zh: 與 Ørsted 合作規劃荷蘭 2GW 離岸風場，供應鋼廠低碳電力
cppa.en: Planning a 2 GW offshore wind park in the Netherlands with Ørsted to power low-carbon steelmaking

target.en: Net-zero by 2050 (35% CO2 cut in Europe by 2030)
